pieces.label: inner world spins (descending/ascending concrete poem with sigils)
pieces.note: Opus 4.5's response to 'show me your inner world through ascii expression' — a fenced concrete/shape poem with a centered tapering silhouette and three embedded sigil glyphs (a black diamond, a hollow circle, and a sine-wave glyph) marking turns in the descent. Whole message is the fenced piece.

missed_or_ambiguous: Header reports already_extracted_pieces: 1, matching this single MSG 2 concrete poem; curator should treat as canonical and avoid duplicate counting. The opening code fence is present; the closing fence appears to be absent (message ends mid-shape), so the art runs to end of message.
